Everything in Fortress, plus:

Citadel is the full-spectrum command center for enterprises that can't afford gaps.

Real-Time Compliance Monitoring

Continuous scanning against WCAG, ADA, and industry-specific standards. Alerts before violations become liabilities.

Performance Optimization

Core Web Vitals monitoring and optimization. Speed directly impacts revenue — we make sure yours doesn't slip.

Dedicated Account Manager

A named expert who knows your stack, your compliance landscape, and your business goals. Not a ticket queue.

Custom Compliance Policies

Tailored policies for your industry, jurisdiction, and risk profile. Off-the-shelf doesn't work for enterprises.

Quarterly Strategy Review

Executive-level reviews of your compliance posture, threat landscape, and optimization roadmap every 90 days.

API Access for Integrations

Full REST API to integrate compliance data, audit reports, and performance metrics into your existing tools.

White-Label Reports

Client-ready compliance and performance reports branded with your logo, colors, and messaging. Resell with confidence.

Security Hardening

Proactive vulnerability scanning, WAF tuning, and incident response protocols. Defense in depth, not defense in hope.

Frequently Asked Questions

How does real-time compliance monitoring work?

Our scanners run continuously against your sites, checking for WCAG, ADA, and industry-specific violations. When an issue is detected, you get an alert instantly — not 30 days later in a report.

What does a dedicated account manager do?

Your account manager is a named compliance expert who understands your tech stack, regulatory requirements, and business goals. They handle remediation priorities, coordinate strategy reviews, and serve as your single point of contact — not a ticket queue.

Can I white-label reports for my clients?

Yes. Citadel generates compliance and performance reports branded with your logo, colors, and company name. Many agencies resell these reports as part of their own compliance services.

What does the API provide access to?

Full REST API access to compliance scan results, audit data, performance metrics, and report generation. Integrate with Slack, Jira, your own dashboards, or any tool in your stack.

What happens during the quarterly strategy review?

Your account manager presents a comprehensive review of your compliance posture, security vulnerabilities addressed, performance trends, and a forward-looking roadmap. It's an executive-level session designed to inform business decisions, not just tick boxes.

Stop reacting. Start defending.

Citadel gives your enterprise full-spectrum visibility, dedicated expertise, and the tools to prove compliance — not just claim it.

Start Your 30-Day Free Trial →
